subject: Civic Education
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Field Visit or Guest Speaker
topics: Arrange a visit to a local organization that supports special groups or invite a guest speaker
from an organisation or institution dealing with special groups to share their experiences. A
guest speaker may also be an individual representing special groups
Every society has certain groups of people who need special attention based on different kinds of needs.
activities: Teaching and Learning Materials: cleaning materials, posters, pictures or videos illustrating
